title.llm_value: Mission of Assistance to the Master's degree 'AMOA' for the implementation of the projects of the Digital Transformation Programme for Citizen-Oriented Public Services 'GovTech'
title.staged_value: Mission d'Assistance à la Maîtrise d'Ouvrage (AMOA) pour l'implémentation des projets du Programme de Transformation Digitale des Services Publics Orientés Citoyens « GovTech »

issuing_organization.staged_value: Ministère des Technologies de la Communication

project_description.llm_value: Framework, study and specification of needs; Development of specifications according to the model requirements of the World Bank; Follow-up of project implementation; Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Definition of organizational and operational framework of implemented solutions; Technical assistance for capacity building of UFP
project_description.staged_value: Assistance à la Maîtrise d'Ouvrage (AMOA) pour l'implémentation des projets du Programme de Transformation Digitale des Services Publics Orientés Citoyens « GovTech »

scope_of_work.llm_value: Framework, study and specification of needs; Development of specifications according to the model requirements of the World Bank; Follow-up of project implementation; Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Definition of organizational and operational framework of implemented solutions; Technical assistance for capacity building of UFP
scope_of_work.staged_value:
• Framework, study and specification of needs
• Development of specifications according to the model requirements of the World Bank
• Follow-up of project implementation
• Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions
• Definition of organizational and operational framework of implemented solutions

required_experience.llm_value: Experience in computer engineering, development of information systems, deployment/reception of telecom services and technology consulting; Experience under similar conditions

required_documents.llm_value: Brochures, references concerning the performance of similar contracts, experience under similar conditions, availability of necessary knowledge among staff, etc.
required_documents.staged_value:
• Brochures
• References concerning the performance of similar contracts
• Experience under similar conditions
• Availability of the necessary knowledge among staff

evaluation_criteria.llm_value: Company strength (30 points), Human means (staff and number of employees) (5 points), Executives (15 points), References (70 points)
evaluation_criteria.staged_value:
Criteria Weight Rating scale Company strength 30
1. Field of activity: The Consultant is responsible for 10
2. Human means (staff and number of employees (05 pts): qualification) - Less than 15 : (1 pt)
- Between >=15 and <50 : (3 pts)
- More than or equal to 50 : (5 pts)
(In the case of a grouping, the number of members of the Grouping will be accumulated)
20 Executives (bicycle engineer + 5 or equivalent in computer or telecommunications) (15 pts): - Less than 15 : (05 pts)
- Between 15 and 30 : (10 pts)
- More than 30 : (15 pts)
(In the case of a grouping, the number of members of the Grouping will be cumulative)
References 70
1. References Similar Missions 30
2. Project management missions 20
3. Design missions and system development references 20

relevance_reason.llm_value: The project involves the development and implementation of digital transformation projects for citizen-oriented public services.
relevance_reason.staged_value: The tender involves the implementation of digital transformation projects and requires technical expertise in information systems, IT consulting, and related fields.

project_description.llm_value: The mission involves providing support services for the implementation of the GovTech programme aimed at digital transformation for citizen-oriented public services in Tunisia.
project_description.staged_value: The mission involves providing support services for the implementation of the GovTech programme aimed at digital transformation for citizen-oriented public services in Tunisia.

deliverables.llm_value: Mission 1: Framework, study and specification of needs; Mission 2: Development of specifications / TDRs according to the requirements of the World Bank; Mission 3: Monitoring of project implementation; Mission 4: Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Mission 5: Definition and implementation of the organizational and operational framework for implementation solutions; Mission 6: Technical assistance to strengthen the capacity of the PFU
deliverables.staged_value: Mission 1: Framework, study and specification of needs; Mission 2: Development of specifications / TDRs according to the requirements of the World Bank; Mission 3: Monitoring of project implementation; Mission 4: Assistance in validating deliverables and receiving solutions; Mission 5: Definition and implementation of the organizational and operational framework for implementation solutions; Mission 6: Technical assistance to strengthen the capacity of the PFU
